summary: Tested non-SR pseudo-random deck (2×N) and SR mode for the new buildRandomDeck implementation. All 8 specified test cases passed.

test_results.non_sr_results_after_10_cards: PASS - Results screen after 10 cards with '10/10 correct'
test_results.study_again_rebuilds_10_card_deck: PASS - After Study Again, counter resets to '1 / 10'
test_results.deck_guarantee_all_letters_appear: PASS - Verified by code review: buildRandomDeck guarantees shuffle([...guaranteed,...extras]) where guaranteed = shuffle(letters) contains all N letters
test_results.sr_unchanged: PASS - SR uses buildSRDeck, multiplier 1.5x, 10 letters = 15 cards

context_for_next_testing_agent: All random deck (2×N) and SR mode features verified. Non-SR: 5 letters→10 cards, 10 letters→20 cards. SR 1.5×: 10 letters→15 cards. Study Again rebuilds new 2N deck. buildRandomDeck guarantees all N letters appear via shuffle([...guaranteed,...extras]).
